name: FrenchYouTubeAutoTranslate_CompletesWithNonEmptyTranscript
statusMessage:
Expected string to be the same string because tstYTTRN001 is a French video served via YouTube's auto-translate path, but they differ at index 0:
   ↓ (actual)
  "failed"
  "completed"
   ↑ (expected).
